who: operations manager in a logistics company managing 10-20 employees
offer: For operations managers in logistics processing 10-20 employee productivity metrics, inaccurate tracking causes inefficiencies. We provide real-time reporting instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to accurately measure employee productivity leads to inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics operations managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on productivity tools
DM outreach to logistics operations managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for operations managers

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
